reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) They limited internet access to those who consumed it; we've been topping up our network for 15 days, but I understand their situation. We toppled up our network and the internet went down several times. I needed to find a place to exchange currency.

(Original)
Limitaram a internet a quem consumisse, estamos a 15 dias abastecendo na rede, mas entendo a situação deles, abastecemos e a internet caiu várias vezes. Precisava ver lugar para fazer câmbio.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4bHU2SzBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo el servicompras. Un café muy rico, las chicas que atienden son un amor. Cuando cargué combustible me atendieron muy bien también. Los baños siempre limpios!

(Translated by Google)
The convenience store is very nice. The coffee is delicious, and the staff are lovely. They also provided excellent service when I filled up my tank. The restrooms are always clean!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4NXZPdjZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Baños muy limpios.
A tener en cuenta completar el tanque si vas camino a Bariloche o si vas a San Martín de Los Andes por camino de los 7 Lagos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very clean restrooms.
Keep in mind to fill up your tank if you're heading to Bariloche or San Martín de Los Andes via the Seven Lakes Route.
